Dakota.notes: First mid-size pickup, same bolt pattern as M-body cars

vehicles.notes: Was 'New Yorker Fifth Avenue' trim package on R-body (1979-1981), not standalone model
Was 'New Yorker Fifth Avenue' trim package on R-body (1979-1981), not standalone model
Was 'New Yorker Fifth Avenue' on M-body (1982-1983)
First year as 'New Yorker Fifth Avenue' standalone trim on M-body
First year as standalone 'Fifth Avenue' model (M-body)

notes: K-cars (Aries, Reliant, LeBaron 1982+) changed from 4-lug to 5-lug in 1986
Early Fifth Avenue (1980-1981) was a trim package on New Yorker, not standalone
Chrysler LeBaron underwent major platform change from M-body RWD (1977-1981) to K-car FWD (1982+)
Chrysler New Yorker changed from R-body RWD (1980-1981) to E-body FWD (1982-1988)
Plymouth Gran Fury changed from R-body (1980-1981) to M-body (1982-1989)
Minivans (Caravan/Voyager) with 15" wheels may use 5x114.3 instead of 5x100
Ram trucks transitioned to 5x139.7 for all models by 1980
